message: test: split connect and cli test suites

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+package cli
+
+import (
+	"os"
+	"testing"
+)
+
+func withStdin(t *testing.T, contents string, fn func()) {
+	t.Helper()
+	old := os.Stdin
+	r, w, err := os.Pipe()
+	if err != nil {
+		t.Fatalf("pipe: %v", err)
+	}
+	if _, err := w.WriteString(contents); err != nil {
+		_ = r.Close()
+		_ = w.Close()
+		t.Fatalf("write: %v", err)
+	}
+	_ = w.Close()
+	os.Stdin = r
+	t.Cleanup(func() { os.Stdin = old })
+	fn()
+	_ = r.Close()
+}
